title: SSE auth failure: continue causes immediate reconnect via None arm
description: After SseNotification::AuthFailed, the code continue-s. The SSE task dropped its sse_tx, so sse_rx.recv() returns None next iteration, setting sse_needs_restart=true and triggering reconnect. Defeats the no-reconnect-after-auth-failure intent. Fix: track sse_auth_failed flag to suppress restart from the None arm.
